title: Worker that differentiates first-attempt from retries
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.EmailWithMetricsWorker` (queue `:mailers`, max_attempts 5). perform/1 destructures `%Oban.Job{attempt: attempt, args: %{"email_id" => id}}` and branches on whether `attempt == 1`. On attempt 1, call `MyApp.Metrics.record_first_attempt(id)` before sending. On retries (attempt >= 2), call `MyApp.Metrics.record_retry(id, attempt)`. Then call `MyApp.Mailer.send(id)` — return `:ok` on success or `{:error, reason}` on failure. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/email_with_metrics_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Tests reading multiple fields from the Oban.Job struct and branching on attempt number — a common retry-analytics pattern.
